label: coffee
description: A small ceramic cup of perfectly brewed black coffee. A wisp of fragrant steam curls toward the ceiling.

label: tea
description: A delicate porcelain cup filled with amber tea — floral and fragrant, steeped just long enough.

label: pastry
description: A golden, flaky pastry still faintly warm from the oven. Butter and honey scent the air around it.
